hero.title: From concept to production.
hero.description: We train the engineers of tomorrow, design custom embedded systems, and supply the hardware to make your projects happen.

education.name: PICO Education
education.description: Educational kits, tutorials and tools to teach electronics and programming.

industrial.name: PICO Industrial
industrial.description: PCB design, embedded systems, industrial automation and electronic engineering.

academy.name: PICO Academy
academy.description: Certified online courses — from beginner to embedded engineer.

store.name: PICO Store
store.description: Buy our kits and modules directly, shipped to Morocco and worldwide.

wiki.name: PICO Wiki
wiki.description: Technical documentation, pinout sheets, libraries and reference guides.

contact.title: An idea? A need?
contact.description: Whether it's an industrial solution, a school kit order or a technical question, we respond within 48h.

about.title: A Moroccan group serving engineering.
about.p1: PICO was born from a conviction: Morocco needs a local platform that trains, equips and supports its engineers, teachers and companies — in French, in Arabic, at local prices.
about.p2: For over 7 years, we have combined expertise in embedded electronics, active pedagogy and direct hardware distribution to offer a complete ecosystem — from the Arduino kit in class to the industrial control system.

precision.title: Precision
precision.desc: Real specs, kept deadlines, code that works.

pedagogy.title: Pedagogy
pedagogy.desc: Explain, document, train — not just deliver.

local.title: Local roots
local.desc: Moroccan by design, international by standard.
